doi_traceability_rules: dataset DOI and publication DOI must remain separate fields
missing DOI values must stay null
linked papers must not be inferred without documentation
paper_link_rules: paper-linked dataset discovery may use explicit registry links only
papers with published data receive a positive discovery signal when documented
license_evidence_rules: exact legal license names must be stored only when explicitly documented
generic dissemination wording must not be treated as an explicit legal license
is_open and allows_reuse may only be classified from explicit documented license evidence

estimator_policy.notes: Only listed estimators are allowed. Every dataset must carry a plausibility assessment using candidate_estimators with justification; pending is allowed when no documented assessment has been performed yet.

identity.title: INSEE - Emploi, chomage, population active
identity.description: French labour-market series covering employment, unemployment, labour-force participation, and unemployment rates across national and subnational breakdowns depending on the series.

spatiotemporal.structure: repeated cross-sections and time series by series
spatiotemporal.spatial_support: France national and some subnational outputs
spatiotemporal.spatial_resolution: France; regions and departments for some series
spatiotemporal.temporal_resolution: variable by series, often annual or quarterly
spatiotemporal.nt_profile: small N / medium-to-long T depending on territorial breakdown

access_metadata.license: public statistical dissemination subject to INSEE terms

license_metadata.name: public statistical dissemination subject to INSEE terms
license_metadata.notes: Exact legal license not yet pinned from official source; current wording is treated as generic access terms only.

access_conditions: Public download available from INSEE publication pages.
Localized unemployment data are also documented as available via api.insee.fr SDMX service.
access_metadata.reproducibility_notes: A raw CSV was downloaded previously, but the exact territorial SDMX endpoint is still missing.

not_preferred_when: strict cross-country harmonized comparison is required
legacy_candidate_estimators: panel or repeated cross-section analysis depending on chosen series
methodological_selection.comparability_notes: Best for national and territorial France use; less suitable than Eurostat LFS for harmonized European comparison.
methodological_selection.indicator_specification: Unemployment counts and rates, employment and labour-force indicators under INSEE/BIT definitions.
risks: exact table identifiers not all pinned down
limitations: The exact SDMX export URL for the localized territorial series was not pinned down.
The current architecture records one raw table historically, not the full family of labour-market series.

identity.title: Eurostat Labour Force Survey
identity.description: Harmonized European labour-force dataset with employment, unemployment, and education measures that includes France and supports cross-country comparison.

spatiotemporal.spatial_support: European countries and selected regional outputs
spatiotemporal.spatial_resolution: Europe including France; some subnational outputs
spatiotemporal.temporal_resolution: annual or quarterly depending on table

license_metadata.name: public aggregate access via Eurostat
license_metadata.notes: Exact legal license not yet pinned from official source; current wording is treated as generic access terms only.

access_conditions: Public aggregate access via Eurostat website and API.
Microdata access conditions differ from public aggregate access.
access_metadata.reproducibility_notes: A raw API export of one regional unemployment table was downloaded previously and documented.

recommended_when: France should be comparable to other European units
not_preferred_when: France-only official series with national statistical framing are preferred
legacy_candidate_estimators: panel or pseudo-panel on aggregate tables
methodological_selection.comparability_notes: More harmonized than INSEE across countries, but table choice remains important for exact topic fit.
methodological_selection.indicator_specification: Employment and unemployment indicators from EU-LFS public aggregate tables.
risks: microdata access differs from aggregate access
limitations: The downloaded file historically used in the project is a regional unemployment-rate table, not the full EU-LFS microdata corpus.
The current wiki still lacks a single pinned table code covering all unemployment and education use cases.

identity.title: UN Comtrade Merchandise Trade Database
identity.description: Global official merchandise trade flows with exports and imports by commodity, country, partner, and time.

use_cases: upstream source for derived trade datasets

spatiotemporal.temporal_resolution: annual with some monthly access paths depending on dissemination

license_metadata.name: UN dissemination terms
license_metadata.notes: Exact legal license not yet pinned from official source; current wording is treated as generic access terms only.

access_conditions: Public methodology, record layout, and explorer pages are available.
access_metadata.update_frequency: roughly biweekly according to official about page
access_metadata.reproducibility_notes: Field structure and official access context are documented, but no raw extraction was run in this architecture update.

recommended_when: maximum global official coverage is required
derived reconciled products are not yet needed
not_preferred_when: reconciled bilateral mirror statistics are essential
legacy_candidate_estimators: panel models on aggregate trade flows
methodological_selection.comparability_notes: Foundational official source; derived datasets like BACI can then be compared against it.
methodological_selection.indicator_specification: Exports/imports and related quantity measures by reporter, partner, product, and time.
limitations: The registry records official methodology and record-layout URLs rather than a concrete raw data export endpoint.

identity.title: OECD International Trade by Commodity Statistics (ITCS)
identity.description: OECD commodity trade panel with annual country-partner-product structure and commodity classifications.

use_cases: metadata comparison against UN Comtrade and BACI

spatiotemporal.spatial_extent: OECD members plus selected non-OECD economies

file_formats: online database and publication-linked data exports

license_metadata.name: OECD dissemination terms
license_metadata.notes: Exact legal license not yet pinned from official source; current wording is treated as generic access terms only.

access_conditions: Public OECD serial page documents annual ITCS dissemination.
access_metadata.reproducibility_notes: Access path is documented, but a stable machine endpoint was not pinned beyond the official serial page.

recommended_when: annual commodity trade comparison is sufficient
not_preferred_when: maximum global official coverage or reconciled bilateral HS6 detail is required
legacy_candidate_estimators: IIT measures after compatible aggregation choices
methodological_selection.comparability_notes: Useful intermediate source between Eurostat regional specificity and full global UN/CEPII sources.
methodological_selection.indicator_specification: Annual exports and imports by commodity and country pair.
risks: less explicit machine access than some other warehouses
limitations: Only the official dissemination page is pinned in the current architecture.

identity.title: CEPII BACI Bilateral Trade Database
identity.description: Harmonized bilateral trade database derived from UN Comtrade, with reconciled exporter-importer reports and HS6 detail.

file_formats: zip archives with csv-like tabular data and metadata files

license_metadata.name: CEPII dissemination terms
license_metadata.notes: Exact legal license not yet pinned from official source; current wording is treated as generic access terms only.

access_conditions: Public direct download portal for yearly files and metadata bundles.
access_metadata.reproducibility_notes: Direct yearly archives and metadata files are documented; no raw file was downloaded in this architecture update.

recommended_when: UN Comtrade mirror discrepancies should be mitigated
not_preferred_when: strictly official raw reporter values are required
methodological_selection.comparability_notes: Best suited for harmonized bilateral trade panels derived from UN Comtrade.
methodological_selection.indicator_specification: Annual bilateral product-level values and quantities at HS6.
risks: derived methodology must be understood before comparing to official raw flows
limitations: Only official access metadata are pinned in the registry; no raw file is downloaded in this architecture update.

identity.title: Eurostat Comext International Trade in Goods (ITG)
identity.description: EU reference trade-in-goods warehouse with strong country-partner-product-time metadata and multiple nomenclatures.

spatiotemporal.spatial_support: reporting country and partner country/economic area
spatiotemporal.temporal_resolution: monthly, annual, or daily depending on table
spatiotemporal.time_range: long historical coverage depending on table

license_metadata.name: public Eurostat dissemination
license_metadata.notes: Exact legal license not yet pinned from official source; current wording is treated as generic access terms only.

access_conditions: Public access through Eurostat database, metadata pages, and machine-readable services.
access_metadata.update_frequency: monthly with annual and daily derivatives depending on table
access_metadata.reproducibility_notes: Access paths are documented; no raw extraction was performed in this architecture update.

recommended_when: partner geography and time need to be explicit
not_preferred_when: global reconciled bilateral trade is needed beyond Eurostat framing
methodological_selection.comparability_notes: Useful bridge between EU official trade dissemination and broader global trade sources.
methodological_selection.indicator_specification: Trade values and quantities by flow, product, reporter, partner, and time.
limitations: Metadata and access layers are documented, but raw downloads were not triggered in this architecture update.

identity.title: Base permanente des equipements
identity.description: Annual French territorial inventory of equipment and services with commune, IRIS, and coordinate-level metadata.

spatiotemporal.structure: annual cross-section with fine spatial support
spatiotemporal.spatial_support: equipment/service locations attached to communes and IRIS

access_metadata.license: public INSEE dissemination subject to INSEE terms

license_metadata.name: public INSEE dissemination subject to INSEE terms
license_metadata.notes: Exact legal license not yet pinned from official source; current wording is treated as generic access terms only.

access_conditions: Public annual file download documented by INSEE.
access_metadata.reproducibility_notes: Direct file access is documented, but no download was performed in this architecture update.

recommended_when: spatial enrichment needs coordinates and classification layers
not_preferred_when: non-French or person-level analysis is required
legacy_candidate_estimators: panel or repeated cross-section by territory after downstream preparation
methodological_selection.comparability_notes: Excellent for local French support design; less suitable for international comparison.
methodological_selection.indicator_specification: Inventory-style counts and categorized locations of equipment and services.
risks: inventory logic differs from survey or transaction datasets
limitations: Metadata were extracted from official source pages only in this architecture update.

identity.title: Demandes de valeurs foncieres geolocalisees
identity.description: French geolocated property transaction dataset with parcel, commune, address, and coordinate metadata in repeated releases.

warehouses.name: data.gouv.fr
warehouses.provider: Etalab / French public open data portal

spatiotemporal.structure: event-level transactions indexed by date and parcel localization fields
spatiotemporal.temporal_resolution: transaction date with semiannual publication rhythm

file_formats: csv or portal-delivered tabular files depending on resource
access_metadata.license: open-data dissemination via data.gouv under publisher terms

license_metadata.name: open-data dissemination via data.gouv under publisher terms
license_metadata.notes: Exact legal license not yet pinned from official source; current wording is treated as generic access terms only.

access_conditions: Public download from data.gouv dataset page.
access_metadata.reproducibility_notes: The access URL is pinned, but no raw file was downloaded in this architecture update.

recommended_when: fine-grained French territorial coordinates are needed
spatio-temporal event data improve metadata coverage
legacy_candidate_estimators: hedonic or local descriptive pipelines after downstream preparation
methodological_selection.comparability_notes: Excellent for local French geography and event time design; not harmonized internationally.
methodological_selection.indicator_specification: Property transaction events with price and cadastral context.
risks: event-level volume may require careful downstream processing
limitations: Only access metadata and official field descriptions are documented in the current architecture.

identity.title: World Development Indicators
identity.description: Global country-time indicator warehouse with rich indicator, geography, and topic metadata.

classification_systems: country metadata such as region, income group, lending type

spatiotemporal.time_range: long historical coverage varying by indicator

license_metadata.name: World Bank open data terms
license_metadata.notes: Exact legal license not yet pinned from official source; current wording is treated as generic access terms only.

access_conditions: Public catalog downloads and API documentation are available.
access_metadata.reproducibility_notes: Catalog and API entry points are pinned; no raw extract was performed in this architecture update.

recommended_when: indicator families and country classifications should be explicit
global comparison matters more than within-country fine geography
not_preferred_when: subnational French or parcel-level spatial work is required
methodological_selection.comparability_notes: Excellent for cross-country metadata coverage, but mostly country-level rather than subnational.
methodological_selection.indicator_specification: Numeric indicators indexed by country, year, and indicator code.
limitations: No direct raw export was downloaded in this architecture update.
